name: QA Test Plan
description: Generates a QA test plan based on a project's dossier and flow

variables.name: persona
variables.label: Tester persona
variables.default: You are a QA tester with 10+ years of experience in the field, mainly with testing AI chatbots.

variables.name: output_file
variables.label: Output file for the test list

stepInfo.description: Read the dossier and the flow to understand how the project works.
List all necessary tests, their acceptance criteria, and their criticality. Write them in a format that's easy for an AI to understand.
Review the tests again and check whether anything was left out or added unnecessarily.
Edit the list based on what you found in the previous step.
